verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the evidence from all agents, explicitly noting the diagnostic value of the yellow license plates (regulatory) and the Dutch street name (linguistic) to confirm the Netherlands. The reasoning was clear, evidence-based, and correctly eliminated Belgium and Luxembourg.
